text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Om nom nom....

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sitting down at the restaurant, I watch in awe as Tosen Jordan shoves
hamburger after hamburger into her mouth. I'm not even sure she's
chewing...
choice_data_list: You like hamburgers, huh?
You like hamburgers, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Mmm, I guess so? My parents are total health nuts, so I was never allowed to eat much junk food as a kid. But it just hits different, ya know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You're a trainer, right? Aren't you gonna stop me? This doesn't
exactly scream "what I eat in a day as a racer."
choice_data_list: Eating like this is fine every once in a while.
Eating like this is fine every once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hm... Weirdo.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I really went hard on those burgers! Anyway, thanks for the
meal, and see you 'round.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like I promised, we ended up only eating together. While I'd like
to get to the bottom of her problems, I also don't want to force her to
talk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch her walk away, I swear to myself that next time, I'll get her
to open up to me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You're a weird one, you know that? I literally have no idea what's going on in that head of yours.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You know... I think my toenails are low-key cursed.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I got injured right after entering the academy. And guess
what? As soon as I got back, everyone else was waaay better than me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Just two more laps—no, four more! I have to keep goin—ow!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You'd be scared, right? You'd go harder in practice, right? Well, I did, and guess what? I got hurt again! So I take a break, and then I'm even farther behind!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: And everyone in my class is already sooo much better than me. I'm sick of being a cringey loser all the time, but that's what's happening...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And I'm just... sick of it all. Guess that means Teach is right. I've lost
my motivation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look down as I contemplate her words. It's true that Jordan's attitude
screams unmotivated, but her actions say otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: If it weren't for my stupid flimsy toe, maybe I—ugh. Forget it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may have been complaining, but the way she was carefully
massaging her toe showed how much she wanted it to heal. That
didn't seem unmotivated to me.
choice_data_list: Do you really believe that?
Do you really believe that?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Didn't you see me run in the last scrimmage? When I tried to run,
something just... happened, and I don't know why.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Everyone said it looked like I wasn't even trying. And if that's how
they all see it, maybe they're ri—
choice_data_list: You looked like you were trying to me.
You looked like you were trying to me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: Weren't you?
Weren't you?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I was. I mean, I thought I was. B-but, like... can I really trust myself to know?
choice_data_list: Why wouldn't you?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I've never been... very good at studying. Or, like, most things really.
And I've got a real nasty temper, so I'd always get in fights. I'm just...
worthless.
choice_data_list: What about races?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I... like racing.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I mean... winning is the vibe. Straight up goals. That's the only time anyone's ever called anything I do amazing.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Racing's... the only thing I've got.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I mean, this is Tracen, right? They should be able to turn even me into a star.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: That's why I wanted to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I nod. It seems she's finally speaking from the heart.
choice_data_list: Do you still want to?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Y-yes...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: B-but I don't want to lose, either! I already feel like a loser, and coming in last again would just make it worse.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
A-all I've got going for me is racing, but now I just keep losing, and
losing, and losing!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: If it turns out I suck at racing too, then what the hell am I good for?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I WANT to win! I want to win lots and lots and LOTS of races! I'm sick of people sleeping on me! I want to make 'em all eat their words!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But I don't know HOW! And when I picture running like I did in the scrimmage again, I can't take it! I don't wanna race if I'm gonna be a cringey loser!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And seeing everyone else try so hard just made me feel even worse,
so I started skipping. I know that's not gonna help me win, but I—
choice_data_list: What if we trained together?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her desire to win is so great that she's deathly afraid of losing...
There aren't a lot of Umamusume with such strong feelings.
choice_data_list:
That desire to win is going to be your greatest
weapon.

That desire to win is going to be your greatest
weapon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When it comes down to the final stretch, and two racers are fighting
for first place, the winner isn't determined by skill, but by who wants
to win more.
choice_data_list: I'd hate to see someone like you give up.
I'd hate to see someone like you give up.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
C-come on, it's not—anyway, what's the point if I can't even run the
way I want to?
choice_data_list: That only happened because you were scared.
That only happened because you were scared.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fear can do strange things to the body—mess with breathing, even
lead to anemia. No doubt that's what happened at the scrimmage.
choice_data_list:
If you went into a race confidently, I bet you'd
win.

If you went into a race confidently, I bet you'd
win.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
N-no way. Everyone's already so far ahead of me. And what about my
weird toe? If I got hurt again, I'd—
choice_data_list: Relax. Let me worry about that.
Relax. Let me worry about that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I reassure her that at this point, she's only missed a little training.
Nothing a little hard work can't fix. I can also create a training
regimen with her toenail in mind.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You really are a weirdo, you know that? You're not even my trainer,
so why? Why go so far for me?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Still... I dunno why, but...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Something about this... is giving me winner energy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cold, hard walls Tosen Jordan built around herself melt away in
that instant, revealing a mischievous smirk and a red-hot sparkle in
her eyes.
